# Omkar Landscape

> Bespoke landscape design, garden development and long-term care studio based in Maharashtra, India. Residential, commercial and farmhouse projects nationwide.

## Studio
- Name: Omkar Landscape
- Founder: Omkar
- Domain: omkarlandscape.com
- Email: omkar@omkarlandscape.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 8767952504
- Location: Maharashtra, India (projects nationwide)

## Services
- Landscape Design — master plans, planting palettes, hardscape detailing
- Garden Development — end-to-end build with in-house crews
- Lawn Development — species selection, base prep, laying, aftercare
- Terrace Garden — rooftop gardens with waterproofing coordination
- Farmhouse Landscaping — estate-scale composition of trees, water, lawns
- Commercial Maintenance — scheduled care for offices and campuses
- Plant Supply — sourcing ornamentals, natives, shrubs, specimen trees
- Consultation & Custom Work

## Pages
- / — Overview and featured work
- /about — Studio story, founder and values
- /services — Full service catalogue
- /portfolio — Selected residential, commercial and farmhouse projects
- /gallery — Photograph gallery
- /contact — Enquiry form

Note: Pricing is discussed privately after understanding the site and brief; no rate cards are published on the website.
